# LinkedIn — About

```
Building at the intersection of AI, cultural technology, and women's health.

I architect AI agents that survive production and build the platforms around them — for founders who need to move fast, teams who need depth, and products whose users aren't the default Silicon Valley persona.
```

## 🤖 AI Agent Engineering

```
Agentic systems designed end-to-end: retrieval (RAG, pgVector), memory, tool use, evaluations, and model routing across Claude, OpenAI, and Llama. Earliest-ecosystem MCP server author — Google News MCP (PulseMCP Top Pick, Glama A-rating). FemTracker Agent merged into CopilotKit's official demos repo (24.6k★).
```

## 💻 Full-Stack Foundations

```
Next.js, TypeScript, Drizzle/Postgres, Stripe, Kubernetes. I've shipped voice-first interfaces (gpt-4o-realtime), bilingual UX, and zero-downtime cloud migrations. GAVIGO IRE — p50 < 1 ms activation, production-validated by Google for Startups + NVIDIA Inception.
```

## 🌿 Cultural-First Technology

```
When your audience isn't the default Silicon Valley user, the framework belongs in the schema, not in UI decoration. Tam-AI-Ti — an AI Financial Wellness Coach for Māori communities — encodes Te Whare Tapa Whā as a first-class domain model. 351 solo commits, 48-table schema, voice-first coaching in te reo Māori and English.
```
